title: Development Cycle
description:
Development Cycle

Development Cycle

Follow these basic steps to edit and run your .NET code:

Stop
	 the .NET project.

Edit
	 the .NET project

Open
	 Epson RC+ 8.0.

Make
	 changes in the Epson RC+ 8.0 project.

Build
	 the Epson RC+ 8.0 project.

Close
	 the RC+ 8.0.

Switch
	 to Visual Studio.

Run
	 the .NET project.
